---
applyTo: "app/tutorials/**"
---

# Tutorial Page Development Rules

All pages under `app/tutorials/` are **static HTML** generated by Next.js (`output: 'export'`).
They are served via GitHub Pages and must be fast, accessible, and SEO-complete.

## Tech Stack

| Layer        | Tool / Library                          | Version     |
| ------------ | --------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| Framework    | Next.js                                 | 15.2.x      |
| React        | React                                   | 19.x        |
| Language     | TypeScript (strict)                     | 5.x         |
| Components   | `@localm/tutorial-framework`            | 1.x (local) |
| Styling      | CSS custom properties (`--tf-*` prefix) | —           |
| Build output | Static HTML (`output: 'export'`)        | —           |
| Hosting      | GitHub Pages                            | —           |

## File Naming

- Route: `/tutorials/<slug>/` → file: `app/tutorials/<slug>/page.tsx`
- Multi-step series: `app/tutorials/<slug>/<step>/page.tsx`
- Index of a series: `app/tutorials/<slug>/page.tsx` (overview) + `app/tutorials/<slug>/<step>/page.tsx`

## Required Exports Per Page

Every `page.tsx` must export:

```tsx
// 1. Metadata for SEO + Open Graph
export const metadata: Metadata = { title: '...', description: '...' };

// 2. Default page component
export default function MyPage() { ... }
```

## Mandatory Component Usage

- **Outer wrapper**: always `<TutorialLayout>` with `header` and `footer` from `SITE_CONFIG`.
- **First component inside layout**: always `<HeroSection>`.
- **Last components**: always `<ShareButtons>` then `<TutorialNav>`.
- **Code samples**: always `<CodeBlock>` — never raw `<pre>`, `<code>`, or template literals in JSX.
- **Callouts**: always `<KeyPoint variant="…">` — never custom `<div>` with alert styling.
- **Lists of concepts**: always `<ConceptGrid>` + `<ConceptCard>` or `<StepList>` + `<StepCard>`.

## Forbidden Patterns

```tsx
// ❌ Custom styling — all colours and spacing must come from --tf-* tokens
<div style={{ background: 'red' }}>
<div style={{ background: 'rgba(99,102,241,0.12)' }}>

// ❌ Hardcoded hex / rgba in components — use semantic tokens
color: "#fff"      // → var(--tf-text-inverse)
color: "#000"      // → var(--tf-bg-base)

// ❌ Bare pixel values for layout/sizing — convert to rem or tokens
width: 32          // → 2rem
padding: "2px 8px" // → "0.125rem 0.5rem"
fontSize: 18       // → var(--tf-text-lg)

// ❌ Hex alpha appended to CSS variables
`${m.color}44`     // → use explicit borderColor with a *-border token

// ❌ Hardcoded letter-spacing
letterSpacing: "0.06em"  // → var(--tf-tracking-wide)
letterSpacing: "0.08em"  // → var(--tf-tracking-widest)

// ❌ Hardcoded transition
transition: "all 0.15s ease"  // → var(--tf-transition-fast)

// ❌ Raw code block
<pre><code>{myCode}</code></pre>

// ❌ Server-side data fetching
export async function getServerSideProps() { ... }

// ❌ Client-only hooks at page level (breaks static export)
const router = useRouter();   // only safe inside useEffect

// ❌ next/image without unoptimized (already set in next.config.ts, but don't override)
<Image ... unoptimized={false} />

// ❌ External icon libraries
import { Icon } from 'lucide-react';

// ❌ !important overrides for framework responsive classes (.tf-concept-grid, etc.)
[style*="grid-template-columns:"] { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
```

## SEO Checklist (every page)

- [ ] `metadata.title` — unique, ≤ 60 chars
- [ ] `metadata.description` — compelling, ≤ 155 chars
- [ ] `metadata.openGraph.type = 'article'`
- [ ] `metadata.openGraph.publishedTime` — ISO date string
- [ ] `HeroSection` `tags` prop — 3–6 relevant keywords

## Content Quality

- Each tutorial must stand alone — don't assume the reader read another page.
- Use `step={N}` on `StepCard` — readers often skip and jump back.
- Wrap every `<CodeBlock>` language value in a known highlight.js alias (`python`, `typescript`, `bash`, `json`, `yaml`, `tsx`, `html`, `css`).
- Prefer `maxWidth="narrow"` for text-heavy reading pages; use `"content"` only when wide diagrams or multi-column layouts are needed.

## Verification Before PR

```bash
# From _tuts/ directory:
npm run build          # must exit 0 with no TypeScript errors
# Then inspect out/ — every tutorial route must have an index.html
ls out/tutorials/<slug>/
```
